replies.msg:
Canadian Parliamentarians accept the recommendation to use Magnitsky Act to sanction Hong Kong officials.

On 27 of November, over 60 Canadian Parliamentarians and staff have attended the event “ Hong Kong at a Critical Time”. This Parliamentarian event was hosted by Garnett Genuis MP and Kenny Chiu MP. Hong Kong Watch co-founder Aileen Calverley and Joey Siu of HKIAD were among the speakers.

James Bezan MP, Tom Kmiec MP, Michael Barrett MP, Heather McPherson MP, Marie-France Lalonde MP and Senator Victor Oh joined this Parliamentary event to show support for Hong Kong’s Freedoms and Democracy. MPs from all three parties, Conservative, Liberal and NDP have attended.

Ms Calverley of Hong Kong Watch recommended the use of Magnisky Legislation to sanction Hong Kong officials and police who are responsible for the abuse of human rights. It was widely accepted by members of Parliament during discussion. A sanction list was requested by MPs.

https://www.facebook.com/HongKongWatch1/photos/a.1478139028973232/2497352627051862/?type=3&theater

Canadian Parliamentarians accept the recommendation to use Magnitsky Act to sanction Hong Kong officials.

On 27 of November, over 60 Canadian Parliamentarians and staff have attended the event “ Hong Kong at a Critical Time”. This Parliamentarian event was hosted by Garnett Genuis MP and Kenny Chiu MP. Hong Kong Watch co-founder Aileen Calverley and Joey Siu of HKIAD were among the speakers.

James Bezan MP, Tom Kmiec MP, Michael Barrett MP, Heather McPherson MP, Marie-France Lalonde MP and Senator Victor Oh joined this Parliamentary event to show support for Hong Kong’s Freedoms and Democracy. MPs from all three parties, Conservative, Liberal and NDP have attended.

replies.msg:
眼見連登一邊話立法會無可能過半, 立法會廢, 無用。我明。

但係老豆豆講真係會有和理非, 會想係個制度裡面盡可能改變令普遍市民既聲音可以主導個政府。

我亦都知好大部分人係堅信五大訴求，缺一不可。
首先係要政府回應、答應五大訴求先。
其中一項係真雙普選，如果做唔到依樣野，係唔可以一步到位做到從體制裡面改變香港。
但係淋病政府一直冷處理，一路拖，拖左我地半年依家先出個<<獨立"檢討"委員會>>。

我個人無咁叻，我唔知道政府黎緊會點做。
我唔知個政府想拖我地幾耐。
政府唔回應、答應。我地就升級再升級。
就好似打緊一場長久而睇唔到終點既仗。

但係立法會選舉下年黎緊，話長唔長，話短唔短，好快就到！
我地仲係到自己人屌自己人，做人都要有Plan A，Plan B。
點解仲唔可以停止爭論！

五大訴求我地要政府俾到交代我地，缺一不可。
立法會最基本野要做好，夠資格就登記做選民。
兄弟爬山，各自努力，目標一致。
繼續high人權法、區議會，我睇唔到香港人出路！
區議會贏，人權法贏，然後我係幾等公民?

D 濕9政客我地睇下就好啦!
我地係爭取緊人一出世就要有既野!!

再係咁下年立法會會無，4年後區會都只係一個循環。

"祈求 民主與自由 萬世都不朽 我願榮光歸香港"
去左邊?
自己香港自己救！

推下行動post好過啦!!!
快通過啦

正
香港人 報仇!

眼見連登一邊話立法會無可能過半, 立法會廢, 無用。我明。

但係老豆豆講真係會有和理非, 會想係個制度裡面盡可能改變令普遍市民既聲音可以主導個政府。

我亦都知好大部分人係堅信五大訴求，缺一不可。
首先係要政府回應、答應五大訴求先。
其中一項係真雙普選，如果做唔到依樣野，係唔可以一步到位做到從體制裡面改變香港。
但係淋病政府一直冷處理，一路拖，拖左我地半年依家先出個<<獨立"檢討"委員會>>。

我個人無咁叻，我唔知道政府黎緊會點做。
我唔知個政府想拖我地幾耐。
政府唔回應、答應。我地就升級再升級。
就好似打緊一場長久而睇唔到終點既仗。

但係立法會選舉下年黎緊，話長唔長，話短唔短，好快就到！
我地仲係到自己人屌自己人，做人都要有Plan A，Plan B。
點解仲唔可以停止爭論！

五大訴求我地要政府俾到交代我地，缺一不可。
立法會最基本野要做好，夠資格就登記做選民。
兄弟爬山，各自努力，目標一致。
繼續high人權法、區議會，我睇唔到香港人出路！
區議會贏，人權法贏，然後我係幾等公民?

D 濕9政客我地睇下就好啦!
我地係爭取緊人一出世就要有既野!!

再係咁下年立法會會無，4年後區會都只係一個循環。

"祈求 民主與自由 萬世都不朽 我願榮光歸香港"
去左邊?
自己香港自己救！

quote.msg:
Canadian Parliamentarians accept the recommendation to use Magnitsky Act to sanction Hong Kong officials.

On 27 of November, over 60 Canadian Parliamentarians and staff have attended the event “ Hong Kong at a Critical Time”. This Parliamentarian event was hosted by Garnett Genuis MP and Kenny Chiu MP. Hong Kong Watch co-founder Aileen Calverley and Joey Siu of HKIAD were among the speakers.

James Bezan MP, Tom Kmiec MP, Michael Barrett MP, Heather McPherson MP, Marie-France Lalonde MP and Senator Victor Oh joined this Parliamentary event to show support for Hong Kong’s Freedoms and Democracy. MPs from all three parties, Conservative, Liberal and NDP have attended.

Ms Calverley of Hong Kong Watch recommended the use of Magnisky Legislation to sanction Hong Kong officials and police who are responsible for the abuse of human rights. It was widely accepted by members of Parliament during discussion. A sanction list was requested by MPs.

https://www.facebook.com/HongKongWatch1/photos/a.1478139028973232/2497352627051862/?type=3&theater

quote.msg:
Canadian Parliamentarians accept the recommendation to use Magnitsky Act to sanction Hong Kong officials.

On 27 of November, over 60 Canadian Parliamentarians and staff have attended the event “ Hong Kong at a Critical Time”. This Parliamentarian event was hosted by Garnett Genuis MP and Kenny Chiu MP. Hong Kong Watch co-founder Aileen Calverley and Joey Siu of HKIAD were among the speakers.

James Bezan MP, Tom Kmiec MP, Michael Barrett MP, Heather McPherson MP, Marie-France Lalonde MP and Senator Victor Oh joined this Parliamentary event to show support for Hong Kong’s Freedoms and Democracy. MPs from all three parties, Conservative, Liberal and NDP have attended.

Ms Calverley of Hong Kong Watch recommended the use of Magnisky Legislation to sanction Hong Kong officials and police who are responsible for the abuse of human rights. It was widely accepted by members of Parliament during discussion. A sanction list was requested by MPs.

https://www.facebook.com/HongKongWatch1/photos/a.1478139028973232/2497352627051862/?type=3&theater
